name: python3-cbor
title: python3-cbor
summary: Python3 Implementation of RFC 7049. Concise Binary Object Representation (CBOR)
description:
Python3 Implementation of RFC 7049. Concise Binary Object Representation (CBOR)
CBOR is comparable to JSON, has a superset of JSON’s ability, but serializes
to a binary format which is smaller and faster to generate and parse.
.
The two primary functions are cbor.loads() and cbor.dumps(). This library
includes a C implementation which runs 3-5 times faster than the Python
standard library’s C-accelerated implementanion of JSON. This is also includes
a 100% Python implementation
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-cbor because Python3 Implementation of RFC 7049. Concise Binary Object Representation (CBOR).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-cbor as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-cbor with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-cbor --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
